LanguageData.FB_PersonalityDevourer_InvalidCaster: Only a personality devourer can consume stored minds.
LanguageData.FB_PersonalityDevourer_HumanlikeOnly: Only dead humanlike bodies can be recorded as colony memories.
LanguageData.FB_PersonalityDevourer_BrainRequired: The corpse must still have a brain.
LanguageData.FB_PersonalityDevourer_AlreadyRecorded: This mind is already recorded in the colony memory.
LanguageData.FB_PersonalityDevourer_CannotReachCorpse: The personality devourer cannot reach that corpse.
LanguageData.FB_PersonalityDevourer_CannotStart: The personality devourer cannot begin consuming that memory.
LanguageData.FB_PersonalityDevourer_RecordFailed: The colony failed to preserve that identity.
LanguageData.FB_PersonalityDevourer_MemoryRecorded: {0} has been recorded in the colony memory.
